visual.notes: Session timed out. Google OAuth is the only auth mechanism; no dev-auth bypass endpoint exists. Chrome MCP cannot complete Google sign-in autonomously (OAuth redirect to accounts.google.com, bot detection, password entry prohibited by safety rules). User must sign in manually before the loop can proceed.

errors: Hydration mismatch on className: server had "cursor-pointer", client removed it

visual.notes: components/ui/Sidebar.tsx:501 — SSR/CSR className divergence for cursor-pointer class on nav button. React logs hydration warning.

Dev server rendered PRE-MIGRATION /dashboard: h1="Welcome back, Fayaz!" with text-page-title+skeuo-emboss classes, no PageHeader component. Disk has PageHeader+PageContainer per commit 8bf7745f, but Next.js dev server is serving stale compiled chunk. HMR did not pick up the committed migration. Touch of page.tsx at 00:09:43 did not force recompile. Requires .next cache nuke + dev server restart to verify the governance PR actually renders.
